list.title: Invoices
list.description: Fiscal receipts (CFDI) issued by this venue.
list.emptyHint: Invoices will appear here once they are issued to your customers.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel invoice
cancelDialog.description: Select the cancellation reason for the SAT. This action cannot be undone.
cancelDialog.motivo01: 01 - Invoice issued with errors, with relation
cancelDialog.motivo02: 02 - Invoice issued with errors, without relation
cancelDialog.motivo03: 03 - The operation did not take place
cancelDialog.motivo04: 04 - Nominative operation related in a global invoice
cancelDialog.substituteUuidPlaceholder: UUID of the CFDI that substitutes this one
cancelDialog.substituteUuidHint: Required by the SAT when the reason is 01.

issueDialog.title: Invoice this bill
issueDialog.subtitle: Issue a CFDI for this bill
issueDialog.razonSocialPlaceholder: Customer name or legal entity name
issueDialog.razonSocialHint: Exactly as registered with the SAT (without the corporate suffix, e.g. no 'S.A. de C.V.').
issueDialog.emailHint: We'll send the invoice to this email.
issueDialog.emailRequiredHint: We'll send your invoice to this email.

errors.validation: Could not invoice. Fix the following:
errors.conflict: This bill already has an invoice or one is in progress.
errors.forbidden: Activate the Pro Plan or invoicing is unavailable.
errors.notFound: Order not found or no fiscal issuer configured.

issueDialog.regimenFiscalHint: Your SAT tax regime (shown on your Constancia de Situación Fiscal).
issueDialog.usoCfdiHint: We only show CFDI uses valid for your tax regime.

cta.title: Need an invoice?
cta.subtitle: Generate your invoice (CFDI) for this bill in under a minute.

dialog.title: Invoice your bill
dialog.subtitle: Enter your fiscal details and we'll send you your invoice.

autofactura.noPdf: Your invoice is ready. We sent it to your email.

errors.validation: Could not invoice. Fix the following:
errors.pacRejected: The SAT rejected the invoice. Check that your tax details match your Constancia de Situación Fiscal.
errors.forbidden: Invoicing is not available for this account.
errors.conflict: This bill cannot be invoiced right now.
errors.generic: Could not generate the invoice. Please try again.

autofactura.sentEmail: We emailed it to you at {{email}}

whatsapp.title: Want it on WhatsApp too?
whatsapp.sent: Done! We sent it to you on WhatsApp.
whatsapp.error: We couldn't send it via WhatsApp. Check the number and try again.

config.title: Invoicing settings
config.description: Set up your fiscal data, certificates (CSD) and which merchants issue invoices.

emisores.title: Issuers
emisores.description: The RFCs you issue invoices with.
emisores.empty: You haven't registered an issuer yet.

emisorForm.title: Issuer details
emisorForm.invoiceCashSalesHint: Off by default. Most businesses don't declare cash, so cash sales aren't invoiced via the receipt QR or the monthly global invoice. Turn it on only if you want cash sales to be invoiceable.
emisorForm.includeCashInAccountingHint: Off by default. Your CASH sales don't enter the fiscal books (IVA, ISR, journal entries). Your “how much did I make?” view always shows them. Turn on only if you want to declare cash.

csdDialog.title: Upload certificate (CSD)
csdDialog.description: Upload your Digital Seal Certificate (.cer and .key) and the key password.

merchants.title: Merchants
merchants.description: Define which accounts and channels generate invoices and how.
merchants.empty: No merchants configured for invoicing yet.

add.title: Add merchant
add.description: Link an account or channel that isn't invoicing yet to an issuer.
add.selectEmisorFirst: Register an issuer before adding a merchant.

merchants.globalHelp: Billing on: lets this merchant issue CFDIs. Self-invoice: customers invoice themselves via the receipt QR. Include in global: Avoqado automatically issues the monthly global invoice to the General Public for sales nobody invoiced. ⚠️ Turn this on ONLY if your accountant does NOT issue it separately. In accounting: turn off to exclude this merchant from your fiscal books (journal entries / IVA / ISR); your management view still shows it.

confirmGlobal.title: Let Avoqado issue your global invoice?
confirmGlobal.description: With this on, Avoqado will automatically issue a monthly global invoice to the General Public for this merchant's sales that no customer invoiced. If your accountant already issues that global invoice, do NOT enable this — you'd be reporting the same income twice to the SAT. Enable only if you want Avoqado to handle the global.

globalInvoice.title: Global invoice
globalInvoice.description: Manually generate the period's global invoice ("Público en General") for each issuer.
globalInvoice.empty: Register an issuer to be able to generate global invoices.
globalInvoice.csdInactiveNote: This issuer has no active CSD. Upload and activate its Digital Seal Certificate to generate the global invoice.

confirm.title: Generate global invoice
confirm.description: ONE single global invoice will be stamped to "Público en General" for the closed period based on the {{periodicity}} periodicity of {{emisor}}. This action cannot be undone.

toast.inProcessTitle: A global invoice is already in progress for this period.
toast.validationTitle: Could not generate the global invoice
toast.pacRejectedTitle: The PAC rejected the global invoice stamp
toast.genericTitle: Could not generate the global invoice

satKeys.sectionDescription: SAT codes used when invoicing this product.
satKeys.categorySectionDescription: SAT codes that products in this category will inherit by default.
satKeys.inheritHint: Products in this category inherit these codes when they don't have their own.
satKeys.objetoImpHint: Indicates whether the product is subject to taxes per the SAT.
satKeys.typeToSearch: Type to search the SAT catalog.
satKeys.empty: No matches in the SAT catalog.

toast.provisionError: Could not connect to the PAC.
toast.merchantSaveError: Could not save the merchant configuration.
